meta.title: The Take | Rebeccah Heinrichs on US Nuclear Deterrence
meta.description:
In episode two of Hudson’s new video series “The Take,” Senior Fellow Rebeccah Heinrichs details the nuclear threats currently facing the United States.

Heinrichs demonstrates how valuable the U.S. nuclear arsenal is to supporting our conventional forces around the globe and deterring adversaries like China and Russia. She also warns that our aging nuclear triad needs a continued bipartisan push for modernizing our weapons and delivery systems.

Read more of Rebeccah’s research on nuclear deterrence: https://www.hudson.org/research/16760-extending-new-start-makes-u-s-nuclear-modernization-imperative
